acceptanceCriteria.description: Implementation matches approved scope for the packaged request.
acceptanceCriteria.rationale: Governed execution packages must not expand scope beyond APPROVED_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION intake.

regressionPlan.title: API contract tests for changed endpoints
regressionPlan.description: Exercise new/changed Express routes with auth headers.
regressionPlan.expectedOutcome: Responses match documented contracts; failures are structured.

recommendations: Attach or regenerate a workflow snapshot so transition testing can be targeted.

migrationRiskSummary.summary: Schema-impacting package: treat migrations as production-critical.
backwardsCompatibility: Prefer additive columns and nullable rollout phases before tightening NOT NULL constraints.
nullabilityRisks: Tightening nullability can fail on existing rows; plan staged backfills and validation queries.
indexPerformance: New filters/sorts may require composite indexes; verify explain plans for list endpoints.
seedBackfill: Identify minimal seed rows required for dev/stage parity.
auditRetention: Do not rewrite immutable audit history; append-only patterns preserve traceability.
trainingDocumentRisks: Schema changes to document/training join tables can break effective-date logic.
rolloutCautions: Ship behind feature flags or staged rollout if workflow and schema change together.
destructiveWarnings: DROP/TRUNCATE/CASCADE deletes are high risk; require explicit sign-off, backups, and restore drill.

fixtureSuggestions.label: CAPA with containment + effectiveness
fixtureSuggestions.purpose: Exercise due dates, ownership, containment actions, and effectiveness checks.
fixtureSuggestions.whenToUse: CAPA workflow, notifications, or reporting changes.

completionGuidance: Done means: approved scope implemented, automated tests added/updated where practical, and audit-friendly logging verified.
Preserve: historical audit rows, immutable timestamps, and human authorization gates for privileged transitions.
Test: permission matrix, workflow transitions, notifications (if any), and schema backfills on representative data.
Avoid: silent destructive migrations, client-only authorization, and undocumented template divergences.
unresolvedGaps: Readiness band is not READY; review recommendations before marking package READY.
